notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Tanner Murray to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. George Springer out at 2nd. Nathan Lukes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi flies out to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery singles on a line drive to left fielder Nathan Lukes. Edgar Quero to 2nd.
